case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. MARK O. SKILBRED et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-12-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SKILBRED, MARK O.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD. HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKILBRED, MARK O. $46,769.78 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,923.00 INTEREST, $335.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $51,528.28, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE LEASED EQUIPMENT LISTED IN THE JUDGMENT - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-17-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN BERNARDINO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SKILBRED, MARK O.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendan: Mark O. Skilbred as follows:
Principal $46,769.78
Prejudgment Interest $1,923.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $335.50, for a total of $51,528.28, and Plaintiff is entitled to the leased equipment listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for detials.
Judgment signed in open court.
